title: Watch: Passenger's view of Boeing 777 engine on fire while in air goes viral
summary_full: A video of a Boeing 777 engine failure, widely shared as recent, actually dates back to February 2021. United Airlines Flight 328 from Denver to Honolulu experienced a catastrophic engine failure shortly after takeoff, forcing an emergency landing. Miraculously, all 241 people aboard and on the ground were safe, though debris rained down on a Colorado town. Investigations by the FAA and NTSB followed this harrowing incident.
